tasks.title: Read-only Runner Temporal workflow + activities + worker: investigate -> classify -> gate -> stop-at-propose; execute/verify no-op under mutation OFF; no OS execution in the workflow + the vote-consuming approval wait (REQ-1105) + the terminal reconcile close-out and reconcile->escalation re-check hand-off (REQ-1113/1115)

scenarios: An ingested incident flows to a sealed gated proposal with no mutation
The action_id is threaded from derivation through the sealed manifest
An incident the agent cannot propose for ends without an action
An approved poll threads the human authorization into the execute path
A denied poll stands the session down without mutation
An unanswered poll times out to deny — never a silent approval
A vote bound to a different action is recorded and ignored — it releases nothing
The interceptor's effect leaf is read-only by default and inert while mutation is off
A gated execution binds evidence, wires an observer, and constructs the argv
A mispredicted post-state verifies as a deviation, not a clean match
A finished session drives a terminal ticket close-out on the governance ledger
A confirmed-clear auto session is closed out to Done
A terminal reconcile never auto-closes an executed action whose post-state deviated
An unanswered poll hands the orphaned incident off to the escalation re-check lane
A persistently failing pipeline activity is retried a bounded number of times then surfaces
A session that exhausts its wall-clock budget stops to the terminal human-handoff

tasks.title: Semantic retrieval plane (TG-40 / audit R1): pgvector knowledge_embedding migration + embeddings client + RRF-fused retriever with honest lexical fallback + bounded sync/backfill write path

scenarios: Precedent ranked by both channels fuses above single-channel precedent
A semantic match below the similarity floor never enters the seed
Retrieval without an embedding model is exactly the lexical behavior
An embedding outage degrades that query to the lexical ranking

tasks.title: Machine-parseable seed-block delimiters (design-wisdom #4): wrap each seed block in a typed XML-style envelope with a trusted/untrusted preamble; neutralize forged envelope delimiters in untrusted data; per-block soft budget; additive to the input screen. Wired through InvestigateActivity (T-012-1 owns activities.go).

scenarios: The seed wraps each block in a typed envelope and a forged guidance delimiter is neutralized

tasks.title: Scheduled FireDue (Gulli ch12 — recovery must be reachable): the escalation requeue lane driven as a Temporal CRON workflow/activity so every due re-check fires/re-escalates/pages/stands down; fail-safe (a FireDue error is captured, never a crash); armed from cmd/worker/main.go (owned by T-012-1)

scenarios: The scheduled FireDue cron fires every due escalation re-check
A FireDue error is captured and never crashes the cron run
